channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: I got tired of writing launchd XML by hand, so I built launchd-gen
item.description: If you've ever tried to schedule a recurring job on macOS, you've met launchd. And if you've spent more than five minutes with it, you've probably thought: "Why is this so much harder than...

item.title: How Do Startups Decide Between MVP and Full Product Development?
item.description: Startups do not fail because they lacked ideas. They fail because they built too much, too soon, or too little, too late. That is the real tension behind MVP app development versus full product...

item.title: CARE Loop: A Human-Centered Framework for Local LLM Development
item.description: # 🔄 CARE Loop Coding → Audit → RAG → Exit (Reincarnation) A human-centered framework for maximizing local LLM performance in software development. Why CARE Loop Exists LLMs are remarkable. They...

item.title: 🌐 How the Internet Works (From Your Device to a Website)
item.description: Ever wondered what actually happens when you open a website Every time you open a website, a complex system of processes works together in milliseconds- most of it completely invisible to you....

item.title:
Anyone else noticed the changes on the site?
- A reader time graph in the stats - A pill design for the tabs above the feed.
The reader graph is humbling on some of the posts, but I tink it is a great addition
How I built a file-sharing tool where even I can't read your files (zero-knowledge architecture in Next.js)
item.description: There's a moment most developers have experienced. You need to send a sensitive file - a private screenshot, a contract draft, a credential - and your options are: email it (it lives on both...

item.title: Top WebSocket APIs for Multi-Asset Streaming in 2026
item.description: For a long time, the standard approach to building a trading dashboard was a fragmented mess. You’d have one socket open for NYSE data, another hitting a crypto exchange like Binance, and likely a...

item.title: ssh-agent
item.description: Technical Beauty — Episode 31 You have typed your passphrase four times this morning. Once to pull from GitHub. Once to deploy to staging. Once to SSH into production. Once because you mistyped it...

item.title: ShowDoc RCE Flaw CVE-2025-0520 Actively Exploited on Unpatched Servers
item.description: A critical security vulnerability impacting ShowDoc, a document management and collaboration service popular in China, has come under active exploitation in the wild. The vulnerability in question...

item.title: Idempotency Is Not Enough: Designing Deterministic Payment Systems
item.description: In payment systems, duplicate processing is not a theoretical problem. It happens in ordinary, boring ways. A user taps a payment button twice. The network times out after the server has already...

item.title: GPT-6 Is Coming: Here's What's Confirmed, What's Hype, and How It Hits Your API Budget
item.description: Every AI newsletter is running "GPT-6 is coming!" headlines. Most mix confirmed facts with unverified rumors without labeling which is which. I tracked every public signal and separated them....

item.title: CISA Adds 6 Known Exploited Flaws in Fortinet, Microsoft, and Adobe Software
item.description: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) on Monday added half a dozen security flaws to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog, citing evidence of active...

item.title: OpenAI has bought AI personal finance startup Hiro
item.description: The acquisition indicates a capability that OpenAI is building into ChatGPT: financial planning.

item.title: Daniel Moreno-Gama is facing federal charges for attacking Sam Altman’s home and OpenAI’s HQ
item.description: Daniel Moreno-Gama is now facing federal charges after allegedly traveling from Texas to California with the intent to kill OpenAI CEO Sam Altman. On April 10th, he was arrested after throwing a...

item.title: You Can Soon Buy a $4,370 Humanoid Robot on AliExpress
item.description: Unitree is bringing its R1 to international markets. It arrives with some aerobatic capabilities and an entry-level price, but the question of what you'd actually do with it remains open.

item.title: The Mercedes EQS returns with massive range and charging gains
item.description: A year ago, Mercedes-Benz did the prudent thing and paused its EQ lineup of electric vehicles in the US. With customer demand drying up for luxury EVs, and federal incentives getting axed by...

item.title: Justin Bieber’s YouTube Coachella set had nothing to do with who owns his music
item.description: This past Saturday at the Coachella music festival, Justin Bieber played the first of two headlining sets in a deal reportedly worth $10 million. It was his most significant solo performance in...

item.title: RAMageddon has come for Microsoft’s Surface Pro and Surface Laptop
item.description: Microsoft just raised the prices across its line of Surface devices amid the global RAM shortage. Now, the 13-inch Surface Pro 11 and the 13.8-inch Surface Laptop 7 cost $500 more than their...

item.title: NZXT to pay $3.45 million settlement over Flex PC rentals
item.description: NZXT and its business partner Fragile have agreed to pay $3.45 million to settle a class-action lawsuit that accused the companies of attempting to "scam" consumers through their Flex PC rental...

item.title: AI influencers are ‘everywhere’ at Coachella
item.description: Coachella kicked off on Friday, and as usual, it's the place to be for online influencers looking to show off their memorable experiences at the festival. A quick scroll through my social media...

item.title: Microsoft is working on yet another OpenClaw-like agent
item.description: The new features would be geared toward enterprise customers, with better security controls than the famously risky open source OpenClaw agent.

item.title: Stanford report highlights growing disconnect between AI insiders and everyone else
item.description: Stanford’s latest AI Index shows a widening gap between experts and the public, with rising anxiety over jobs, healthcare, and the economy.

item.title: The Apple Watch Series 11 has returned to its best-ever price
item.description: If you’re still holding onto an older Apple Watch, now might be a good time to upgrade. Right now, the 42mm Apple Watch Series 11 with GPS is on sale for around $299 ($100 off) at Amazon, Best...

item.title: Xbox Game Pass ‘has become too expensive,’ says Microsoft’s new gaming chief in leaked memo
item.description: Microsoft's new Xbox chief, Asha Sharma, has signaled that Xbox Game Pass pricing is about to change. In an internal memo to Xbox employees, obtained by The Verge, Sharma admits that "Game Pass...

item.title: JanelaRAT Malware Targets Latin American Banks with 14,739 Attacks in Brazil in 2025
item.description: Banks and financial institutions in Latin American countries like Brazil and Mexico have continued to be the target of a malware family called JanelaRAT. A modified version of BX RAT, JanelaRAT is...

item.title: You can make a multicolor MacBook Neo out of Apple’s spare parts
item.description: If you're having trouble deciding on a color for a new MacBook Neo, you might not have to choose just one. The folks over at MacWorld found that Apple doesn't appear to limit the colors of spare...

item.title: On Anthropic’s Mythos Preview and Project Glasswing
item.description: The cybersecurity industry is obsessing over Anthropic’s new model, Claude Mythos Preview, and its effects on cybersecurity. Anthropic said that it is not releasing it to the general public...

item.title: Read OpenAI’s latest internal memo about beating the competition — including Anthropic
item.description: OpenAI's chief revenue officer, Denise Dresser, sent a four-page memo to employees on Sunday about the company's strategic direction, emphasizing the need to lock in users and grow its enterprise...

item.title: Meta Is Warned That Facial Recognition Glasses Will Arm Sexual Predators
item.description: More than 70 organizations, including the ACLU, EPIC, and Fight for the Future, say the AI smart glasses feature would endanger abuse victims, immigrants, and LGBTQ+ people.

item.title: Why opinion on AI is so divided
item.description: This story originally appeared in The Algorithm, our weekly newsletter on AI. To get stories like this in your inbox first, sign up here. In an industry that doesn’t stand still, Stanford’s AI...
